---
title: "census_extract"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(viridis)
library(data.table)

# --- 1. PROVINCE SHAPEFILE

municipalities <- st_read(here("provincia_potosi.shp"))
provinces <- municipalities |>
  group_by(provincia) |>
  summarize(geometry = st_union(geometry))

# add province labels
province_indexed <- provinces |>
  mutate(
    iprov = case_when (
provincia == "Tomás Frías" ~ 1,
provincia == "Rafael Bustillo" ~ 2,
provincia == "Cornelio Saavedra" ~ 3,
provincia == "Chayanta" ~ 4,
provincia == "Chárcas" ~ 5,
provincia == "Nor Chichas" ~ 6,
provincia == "Alonso de Ibáñez" ~ 7,
provincia == "Sur Chichas" ~ 8,
provincia == "Nor Lipez" ~ 9,
provincia == "Sur Lipez" ~ 10,
provincia == "José María Linares" ~ 11,
provincia == "Antonio Quijarro" ~ 12,
provincia == "General Bilbao" ~ 13,
provincia == "Daniel Campos" ~ 14,
provincia == "Modesto Omiste" ~ 15,
provincia == "Enrique Baldivieso" ~ 16
  )
)

# --- 2. PERSONA (individual-level data)
census_p <- fread('Persona_CPV-2024.csv', sep = ";")

potosi_res <- census_p |>
    filter (
    idep == 5, # residents in Potosí department
    p36_lugres == 1 # habitually live here
  )

province_census_p <- potosi_res[, .(
  population = .N,
  prop_uses_public_health = mean(p30a_public == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_only_informal = mean(
    (p30e_tradic == 1 | p30f_autome == 1 | p30g_casera == 1) & 
    (p30c_privad != 1 & p30d_atedom != 1), 
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
), by = iprov]


# names(potosi_res)
province_census_p <- potosi_res[, .(
  population = .N,
  # --- Ages
  prop_children_under6     = mean(p26_edad < 6, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_elder_65plus        = mean(p26_edad >= 65, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_age_vulnerable      = mean(p26_edad < 6 | p26_edad >= 65, na.rm = TRUE),
  # --- Health access
  prop_no_health_insurance = mean(p31_afiliado == 4, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_uses_public_health = mean(p30a_public == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_uses_traditional    = mean(p30e_tradic == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
 prop_informal_health_only = mean(
  (p30e_tradic == 1 | p30f_autome == 1 | p30g_casera == 1) &   # uses informal care
  (p30c_privad != 1 & p30d_atedom != 1 & p30a_public != 1),     # does NOT use formal care
  na.rm = TRUE
),
  # --- Livelihoods
  prop_farm                = mean(p51_actec_2d == 1 & p51_actec_2d != 9, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_mine                = mean(p51_actec_2d == 2 & p51_actec_2d != 9, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_manufacture         = mean(p51_actec_2d == 3 & p51_actec_2d != 9, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_construct           = mean(p51_actec_2d == 6 & p51_actec_2d != 9, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_indigenous          = mean(p32_pueblo_per == 1 & p32_pueblo_per != 9, na.rm = TRUE),
  # --- Agricultural indicators
  prop_agro_participation  = mean(p45_agro == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_agro_for_sale       = mean(p46_dest == 1 & p45_agro == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_agro_for_consumption= mean(p46_dest == 2 & p45_agro == 1, na.rm = TRUE), # consumed by family
  # --- Disability
  prop_disabled           = mean((p42a_ver %in% 3:4 | p42b_oir %in% 3:4 | p42c_camina %in% 3:4 | p42d_comuni %in% 3:4) &       (p42a_ver != 9 & p42b_oir != 9 & p42c_camina != 9 & p42d_comuni != 9), na.rm = TRUE
),
  # --- Child loss
  prop_child_loss          = mean((p54_hvtot - p55_hstot) > 0 & # total children born - total children alive
                                    p54_hvtot < 98 & # these remove missing/unspecified responses
                                    p55_hstot < 98, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = iprov]

province_sum_p <- province_census_p |>
  left_join(province_indexed, by = "iprov")

# --- 3. VIVIENDA (household-level data)
census_h <- fread('Vivienda_CPV-2024.csv', sep = ";") |>
  filter(idep == 5)
# names(census_h)

province_census_h <- census_h[, .(
  households = .N,
  prop_river_water         = mean(v07_aguapro == 7, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_unprotected_water   = mean(v07_aguapro %in% c(3,5,7,9), na.rm = TRUE), # rainwater, unprotected well, river/ditch, other
  prop_no_pipes   = mean(v08_aguadist == 3, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_unsafe_solid_waste = mean(v11_basura %in% c(3,4,5,6),na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_unsafe_liquid_waste = mean(v16_desague %in% c(3,4,5),na.rm = TRUE),
  # --- Home structural vulnerability (maybe relevant for air pollution)
  prop_home_structural_vuln = mean(
  (v03_pared %in% c(2,3,4,5,6)) |   # vulnerable walls — adobe, tabique, stone, wood, cane/palm
  (v05_techo %in% c(1,4))     |   # vulnerable roof — corrugated metal, straw/palm/cane/mud
  (v06_piso %in% c(1,2,3)),       # vulnerable floor — dirt, wooden plank, parquet
  na.rm = TRUE
)

), by = iprov]

province_sum_h <- province_census_h |>
  left_join(province_indexed, by = "iprov")

# --- 4. MORTALIDAD (mortality data)
census_m <- fread('Mortalidad_CPV-2024.csv', sep = ";") |>
  filter(idep == 5 & m213_edad != 999)

province_census_m <- census_m [, .(
  deaths = .N,
  avg_age_death = mean(m213_edad, na.rm = TRUE),
  young_deaths = sum(m213_edad < 50, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_under50 = mean(m213_edad < 50, na.rm = TRUE),
  child_deaths5 = sum(m213_edad < 5, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_child_deaths5 = mean(m213_edad < 5, na.rm = TRUE),
  child_deaths15 = sum(m213_edad < 15, na.rm = TRUE),
  prop_child_deaths15 = mean(m213_edad < 15, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = iprov]

province_sum_m <- province_census_m |>
  left_join(province_indexed, by = "iprov")

# --- 5. Combine everything
prov_summary <- province_indexed |>
  left_join(province_census_p,  by = "iprov") |>
  left_join(province_census_h, by = "iprov") |>
  left_join(province_census_m,  by = "iprov")

# --- 6. Export
st_write(prov_summary, "potosi_census_summary.gpkg", driver = "GPKG")
```

```{r}
province_shp <- prov_summary

province_shp <- province_shp |>
  rename(
    pop = population,
    prop_ch_u6 = prop_children_under6,
    prop_elder65 = prop_elder_65plus,
    prop_age_vuln = prop_age_vulnerable,
    prop_no_health = prop_no_health_insurance,
    prop_pub_health = prop_uses_public_health,
    prop_trad_care = prop_uses_traditional,
    prop_inf_only = prop_informal_health_only,
    prop_farm = prop_farm,
    prop_mine = prop_mine,
    prop_manu = prop_manufacture,
    prop_cons = prop_construct,
    prop_indig = prop_indigenous,
    prop_agro_part = prop_agro_participation,
    prop_agro_sale = prop_agro_for_sale,
    prop_agro_cons = prop_agro_for_consumption,
    prop_disab = prop_disabled,
    prop_child_loss = prop_child_loss,
    hh_count = households,
    prop_river_w = prop_river_water,
    prop_unprot_w = prop_unprotected_water,
    prop_no_pipe = prop_no_pipes,
    prop_solid_ws = prop_unsafe_solid_waste,
    prop_liq_ws = prop_unsafe_liquid_waste,
    prop_struct_vuln = prop_home_structural_vuln,
    deaths_tot = deaths,
    deaths_avg_age = avg_age_death,
    deaths_under50 = young_deaths,
    prop_under50 = prop_under50,
    deaths_u5 = child_deaths5,
    prop_u5 = prop_child_deaths5,
    deaths_u15 = child_deaths15,
    prop_u15 = prop_child_deaths15
  )

# write shapefile
st_write(province_shp, "potosi_census_summary_shape.shp", driver = "ESRI Shapefile")
```

``` {r read_shp}
census_shp = st_read(here::here("data/census/census_summ.shp"))
# map out the shp file using prop_age_vuln
leaflet(census_shp) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~viridis::viridis(100)[as.numeric(cut(prop_age_vuln, breaks = 100))],
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    color = "white",
    weight = 1,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<strong>Province: </strong>", provincia, "<br/>",
      "<strong>Population: </strong>", pop, "<br/>",
      "<strong>Prop. Age Vulnerable: </strong>", round(prop_age_vuln * 100, 2), "%<br/>",
      "<strong>Prop. No Health Insurance: </strong>", round(prop_no_health * 100, 2), "%<br/>",
      "<strong>Prop. Uses Public Health: </strong>", round(prop_pub_health * 100, 2), "%<br/>",
      "<strong>Prop. Informal Health Only: </strong>", round(prop_inf_only * 100, 2), "%<br/>",
      "<strong>Households: </strong>", hh_count, "<br/>",
      "<strong>Prop. River Water: </strong>", round(prop_river_w * 100, 2), "%<br/>",
      "<strong>Total Deaths: </strong>", deaths_tot, "<br/>",
      "<strong>Avg. Age at Death: </strong>", round(deaths_avg_age, 2), "<br/>",
      "<strong>Prop. Deaths Under 50: </strong>", round(prop_under50 * 100, 2), "%<br/>"
    )
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    pal = viridis::viridis,
    values = census_shp$prop_age_vuln,
    title = "Proportion of Age Vulnerable (<6 or 65+)",
    position = "bottomright"
  )
```
